title: Sri Sunama Jakini Matha
tagline: Sri Sunama Jakini Matha — spiritual town of Andhra Pradesh

heroImage.alt: Sri Sunama Jakini Matha, Andhra Pradesh

overview.short: Sri Sunama Jakini Maata is a temple built to honor a legendary Indian woman who was deified.
overview.description: Sri Sunama Jakini Maata is a temple built to honor a legendary Indian woman who was deified. She was born in Suryavamshi Kshatriya Are-Katika community of Pinnepalli village in Anantapur district, Andhra Pradesh, India. A temple was built for this goddess in Gooty town of Anantapur district, Andhra Pradesh is also one of the first temples for Suryavamshi Kshatriya Are-katika community.

topPlaces.name: Gooty
topPlaces.description: Gooty ( GUUTH-ee; Telugu: గుత్తి, transliterated as Guththi) is a town in Anantapur district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is the headquarters of Gooty mandal in Anantapur revenue division.

topPlaces.description: Kasepalli is a village in the Peddavadugur mandal in Anantapur District of Andhra Pradesh, India.

Gooty ( GUUTH-ee; Telugu: గుత్తి, transliterated as Guththi) is a town in Anantapur district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is the headquarters of Gooty mandal in Anantapur revenue division.
Kasepalli is a village in the Peddavadugur mandal in Anantapur District of Andhra Pradesh, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sri Sunama Jakini Matha?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sri Sunama Jakini Matha is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sri Sunama Jakini Matha?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kurnool Airport (79 km) and the nearest railway station is KSR Bengaluru City Junction (240 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sri Sunama Jakini Matha?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sri Sunama Jakini Matha at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sri Sunama Jakini Matha?
faq.a: Stays in Sri Sunama Jakini Matha start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sri Sunama Jakini Matha?
faq.a: The top attractions are Diesel Loco Shed, Gooty, Gooty, Kasepalli.
